reviews.review_description: Honestly I like this game but barely anything happens I wish I could jump instead of just constantly climbing default movement where you have to swing ur arms sucks (btw if they didn’t have joystick control this would be 1star) if you ever make the full game here’s some ideas 1.enemies bc there’s no fighting at all the only enemy is the bird that knocks you out when you climb and make it so that I can make a fist I really want this to be like Indiana Jones great circle maybe final bosses at the end of the game I also want to play as Indiana jones maybe? I wish more fun stuff like this could be added instead of a gorilla taggish game where all you do is grab gold and climb I also want stuff to spend the money on from the adventures

developer_response.body: Hi greenrangerdragonzord! Thank you for writing this review. Yes, there are other enemies in the full game (we are in the process of finishing the co-op / asymmetrical multiplayer, where your friends can control the enemies on smartphones). We are glad that the joystick option was helpful to you and if you would like to provide any screenshots or footage to describe your frustration with the default movement, feel free to share on our Discord. The traps in the demo are quite subdued for new players, but I hope you will enjoy the more complex challenges in the full game.

reviews.review_description: Still have a lot of work to be done on this VR game, I will not buy it no teleport, made my stomach wezy for the short time I played

developer_response.body: Hi lurene312! So sorry to hear the movement system made you motion-sick. I'd be interested to know if you play any other VR games with joystick. Are there features we could add that would help alleviate your motion-sickness (besides teleporting)? Thank you for trying the experience.

reviews.review_description:
This has the makings of a great Indiana Jones type adventure. Cross caverns on ropes, climb rocks all add together to make a fun time. 
The game ran very smoothly….once I had discarded the weird way of running and went back to my joystick! 
My only dislike was the very weird hands!
Great game though. Can’t wait for the whole game.

This game is perfect for anyone who loves exploration and treasure hunting. The full-body motion controls make it easy to feel immersed as you avoid traps and collect hidden treasures. The action is engaging and has a nice Indiana Jones vibe. A solid choice for fans of adventure games looking for something fun and interactive!
